name: Cookies & Cream Cake
recipeIngredient: vanilla ice cream, divided for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix cake ingredients in a large bowl until smooth.
3. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch round cake pan and bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
4. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
5. In a separate bowl, mix cookie dough with flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, buttermilk, and vanilla extract until crumbly.
6. Shape the dough into small balls and fry in batches until golden brown.
7. Place fried cookies on a wire rack to cool.
8. Cut cooled cake into wedges and top each with a fried cookie and a scoop of vanilla ice cream. Serve immediately.
